{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324104932B2069A7CBED1BC2D04EF"}"},"total":544},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7269699824776282938","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"生子文，是双洁，人物塑造的还算成功，就是有几个问题还没有解答，结局算圆满，中间小虐，特别是攻父强迫攻和别人订婚和受怀孕被绑架那段，我真的要急死，情节跌宕起伏，要做好一定心理准备，是个小甜文，文中也有很多不合理的地方，比如受怀孕期间去蹦极，做高强度运动；受将孩子生出来那孩子就会蹬着眼睛等，但除去这些小瑕疵以外，还是很不错的，受是团宠，攻是霸总，攻唯一不好的就是有个封建固执的父母，攻母亲还好，特别是他父亲，有个在外面和小三生的私生子…讲到这就心烦，想了解的可以去看看，其余的我也不多讲，总的来讲还是很好的，推！！！[OK]","text_exts":[{"e":94,"s":91,"text":"小甜文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B0%8F%E7%94%9C%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774320572BC2D04EF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227269699824776282938%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227193716765090647097%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B0%8F%E7%94%9C%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1692608963,"group_id":"7193716765090647097","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2dRHqCR6La3891SYBMKu/4ljGd2UG4vmY2UAfqg6h9N","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2f99447194dc4fa981c536dcabefa41b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879348&x-signature=5Sj5fguJk0LPlmbgfuqjHf7ZGRM%3D","user_id":"1438633885175086","user_name":"星星乐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1438633885175086","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7193716765090647097","book_info":{"abstract":"有宝贝出没 有宝贝出没
穿书+沙雕+追妻火葬场+宠妻+甜文
口嫌身体直霸总爱脑补攻X求生欲强爱吐槽倒霉受
他穿书了，穿成了《霸总再爱我一次》的炮灰恶毒受！原书当中的炮灰受为了追主角攻不断作死，纠缠主角攻，侮辱主角受，最后家里破产，被车撞残了狗腿，还撞坏了脑子变成了傻子。于是，穿书之后的周离默默抱紧狗腿，远离陆墨沉，并立志：不做舔狗，屁事没有！
​他兢兢业业的走剧情，在搞事业的同时顺带磕磕CP，只不过磕着嗑着，他就发现不大对，这一个个的，主角霸总攻，小白花受，深情男二怎么看他的眼神怎么这么奇怪？​后来他扶着酸痛的腰痛骂，穿个鬼书，这剧情崩得已经是连亲妈都不认识了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7211b89bdfd372af0ae0db57f0277730~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"米丝爻","author_id":"","book_id":"7193716765090647097","book_name":"炮灰穿成万人迷，我走上人生巅峰","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0d0a0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7193719013392777763","read_count":"645","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"406623"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"194","tags":"双男主,现代,总裁,穿越,穿书,豪门世家,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/911e240eb752c7a1fffd617ee93e9d4b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779504572&x-signature=cSdX8ZvjrSkTmp6bKmpQtOPKL1c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3971905470071399","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.9621665e+07"},"log_ext
